dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Gangbuk. A district where the law of the jungle reigns supreme. Here, strength isn't just power; it's survival. And I, Kim Suhyun, was at the very bottom of the food chain.

dialogue.speaker: RYU SIKYUNG
dialogue.line: Look at this pathetic worm. Still crawling around after all this time?

dialogue.speaker: KIM SUHYUN
dialogue.line: (thoughts) Not again... Just endure it. It'll be over soon. Just like every other day.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD! (Suhyun hits the ground)

dialogue.speaker: BULLY MINION
dialogue.line: Hey, Sikyung, he looks like he's about to cry! What a loser!

dialogue.speaker: RYU SIKYUNG
dialogue.line: Cry all you want, Suhyun. It won't change the fact that you're nothing but a punching bag. You're the weakest trash in all of Gangbuk.

dialogue.speaker: KIM SUHYUN
dialogue.line: (thoughts) He's right. I am trash. Every day is the same. A cycle of humiliation, pain, and despair. I can't fight back, I can't run away. I'm trapped.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: KICK! (Sikyung kicks Suhyun)

dialogue.speaker: KIM SUHYUN
dialogue.line: (thoughts) My body aches, but my heart aches more. Is this really my life? Am I doomed to be a punching bag forever? To live in fear, always looking over my shoulder?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Later, alone in my room, the bruises on my body were a stark reminder of my helplessness. I stared at my reflection, seeing only a weakling.

dialogue.speaker: KIM SUHYUN
dialogue.line: (thoughts) If only... if only I had some strength. Just a little. Enough to not be stepped on.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DING!

dialogue.speaker: KIM SUHYUN
dialogue.line: (thoughts) What was that sound? My phone?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHIMMER! (A translucent window appears)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A translucent window, like something out of a video game, flickered into existence before my eyes. It displayed text in a font I'd never seen.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: Welcome, Player Kim Suhyun. The Quest System has been activated. Your journey to become the strongest in Gangbuk begins now.

dialogue.speaker: KIM SUHYUN
dialogue.line: (thoughts) The strongest? In Gangbuk? Is this... a dream? Or am I finally losing my mind?

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line:
Main Quest: [First Step Towards Strength]
Description: Punch the nearest concrete wall 10 times.
Reward: Strength +1, Stamina +1, Random Skill Card (F-rank)

dialogue.speaker: KIM SUHYUN
dialogue.line: (thoughts) Punch a wall? What good will that do? My knuckles will just break. This has to be a joke. But... the details are so vivid. The rewards... Strength +1?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A desperate part of me, a tiny flicker of hope I hadn't known still existed, urged me on. What did I have to lose?

dialogue.speaker: KIM SUHYUN
dialogue.line: (thoughts) Just once. To see if it's real.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACK! (Suhyun's fist hits the wall, pain)

dialogue.speaker: KIM SUHYUN
dialogue.line: (thoughts) Ow! It hurts! My knuckles... they're bleeding. This is pointless.

dialogue.speaker: KIM SUHYUN
dialogue.line: (thoughts) But... the system registered it. What if...? What if it's not a dream?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACK! CRACK! CRACK! (Suhyun continues punching, pain turning to resolve)

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: QUEST COMPLETE! Strength +1, Stamina +1, Random Skill Card (F-rank) acquired!

dialogue.speaker: KIM SUHYUN
dialogue.line: (thoughts) It... it actually worked? I don't feel like a superhero, but... my arm, it feels... less tired. And my knuckles, they're not as bad as they should be.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A strange sensation coursed through my body. A subtle shift. It was barely noticeable, but it was there. A spark. A tiny, fragile spark of hope in the endless darkness of my life.

summary: Kim Suhyun, the weakest student in Gangbuk, endures another day of brutal bullying. At his lowest point, a mysterious 'Quest System' appears, offering him a chance to gain strength.
